title: atropis convoluta var. expansa
intro: Atropis convoluta var. expansa, also known as the Japanese angelica tree, is a type of plant that belongs to the angelica family and is native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Atropis convoluta var. expansa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
